case_title: CREATIVE CIRCLE, LLC, VS. NINTHDECIMAL, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $513.25 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100130065) AS TO DEFENDANT NINTHDECIMAL, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION
